prompt: Write a trap hi-hat pattern with 16th-note rolls that speed up mid-bar.

args.content:
ch 1 Melody
  plugin mini
  strip console1

ch 2 Bass
  plugin bass
  strip console1

ch 3 Chords
  plugin jup8
  strip console1

ch 4 Kick
  plugin kick

ch 5 Snare
  plugin drums

ch 6 HiHat
  plugin drums

arr verse 4 chorus 4

sec verse
  ch 1 Melody
    p q q q q
    n 60 62 64 65

  ch 2 Bass
    p q _q q _q
    n 36

  ch 3 Chords
    p w w
    n 48 52 55

  ch 4 Kick
    p q _q q _q
    n 36

  ch 5 Snare
    p _q q _q q
    n 38

  ch 6 HiHat
    p x x x x x x t t t t x x x x t t t t f f f f f f f f
    n 42

sec chorus
  ch 1 Melody
    p q q q q
    n 65 67 69 72

  ch 2 Bass
    p q q _q q
    n 36

  ch 3 Chords
    p w w
    n 53 57 60

  ch 4 Kick
    p q _q q _q
    n 36

  ch 5 Snare
    p _q q _q q
    n 38

  ch 6 HiHat
    p x x x x x x t t t t x x x x t t t t f f f f f f f f
    n 42

judgment.relevance_reason: The AI successfully generated a trap hi-hat pattern with 16th notes speeding up to 32nd and 64th notes, but missed adding velocity variation as specified in the expected behavior.
judgment.quality_reason: The rhythmic subdivisions accurately reflect typical trap hi-hat rolls that accelerate over the course of the bar, though lacking dynamic variation makes it slightly mechanical.
